title: Multiple jira-monday automations on the same board
excerpt:
For our project mgm we use jira and monday.

posts.author: almog22 (almog)
posts.cookedHtml:
For our project mgm we use jira and monday.
Each project has both a jira ticket and a monday board, each jira-stage is represented in a board-group (with multiple sub-tasks, more detailed as to what in to be completed in this stage).

Every time the jira transition to a new stage, I want to update to corollated monday group with date/owner/other stuff.

Currently you can only define 1 automation between jira to monday, so I can only apply it to one group.
